message:
feat(messaging): add SublistLinkCache for per-link subject resolution hot cache

Add a bounded LRU-style cache that links or sessions can keep alongside
their own state to avoid re-walking the trie on repeated hot subjects.
The cache respects the sublist generation counter, so stale entries are
transparently invalidated when subscriptions change.

SublistLinkCache:
- new(capacity): bounded entry count with minimum of 1
- len()/is_empty(): introspection
- get(): generation-checked lookup
- insert(): LRU eviction via VecDeque order tracking
- Default: 64-entry capacity

Sublist/ShardedSublist integration:
- lookup_with_link_cache(): check link cache first, fall through to
  trie on miss or stale generation, populate cache on trie hit
- ShardedSublist::lookup_with_link_cache(): shard-aware variant
  that checks the link cache per-shard

Tests:
- link_cache_hit_avoids_trie_walk
- link_cache_miss_on_stale_generation_repopulates
- link_cache_evicts_oldest_at_capacity
- sharded_sublist_link_cache_routes_correctly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
